note: Arquivo de dados legível do Travellers Rest Guide. O site usa ../data.js para carregar no navegador; este JSON fica aqui para edição/consulta no GitHub.

materials.name: Chicken Coop / Galinheiro
materials.build_cost: 25 Wooden Planks + 15 Iron Nails + 10 Mortar + 15 Gold
materials.capacity: Level 1: 4 chickens; Level 2: 5 chickens; Level 3: 6 chickens
materials.upgrades: Level 2: 30 Wooden Planks + 20 Iron Nails + 12 Mortar + 35 Gold. Level 3: 50 Wooden Planks + 30 Iron Nails + 15 Mortar + 50 Gold.
materials.notes: Requires items in inventory when placing the order. Max 2 coops. Chickens are bought from Holly after construction. Eggs are collected automatically in the coop. Feed chickens with Seeds Mix and fill trough with Bucket with Water.

materials.name: Barn / Celeiro
materials.total_fully_upgraded_cost: 135 Gold + 190 Wooden Planks + 135 Iron Nails + 60 Mortar
materials.capacity: Starts with 4 stalls; upgrades up to 8 stalls
materials.notes: Only 1 Barn can be built per farm. Houses cows, sheep and pigs. Initial construction takes 3 days.

materials.name: Chicken / Galinha
materials.get: Buy from Holly after Chicken Coop is built.
materials.notes: Produces Egg every 2 days at maximum growth rate. Place it in the coop using Decoration Mode.

materials.name: Egg / Ovo
materials.notes: Chickens produce 1 Egg every 2 days at maximum growth rate.

materials.name: Wooden Planks
materials.notes: Needed for tool upgrades, Chicken Coop, Barn and construction.

materials.name: Iron Nails
materials.notes: Needed for Chicken Coop and Barn construction/upgrades.

materials.name: Mortar
materials.notes: Needed for Chicken Coop and Barn construction/upgrades.

materials.name: Queen Bee / Abelha Rainha
materials.get: Rare drop from mature trees outside tavern

tools.name: Iron Pickax / Picareta de Ferro
tools.recipe: Copper Pickax + 30 Iron Bar + 60 Wooden Planks
tools.use: Recommended first upgrade for Ore Galore progression.

tools.name: Iron Axe / Machado de Ferro
tools.recipe: Copper Axe + 30 Iron Bar + 60 Wooden Planks
tools.use: Second recommended upgrade for terrain cleanup.

tools.name: Cobalt Pickax / Picareta de Cobalto
tools.recipe: Iron Pickax + 45 Cobalt Bar + 40 Noble Wooden Planks

tools.name: Cobalt Axe / Machado de Cobalto
tools.recipe: Iron Axe + 45 Cobalt Bar + 40 Noble Wooden Planks

food.name: Anchovies in Oil / Anchovas no Óleo
food.category: Recipe • Ingredients include Oily Fish / Anchovy + Oil.

food.name: Yogurt with Honey / Iogurte com Mel

fish.name: Oily Fish / Peixe Oleoso
fish.notes: Includes Trout, Piranha, Salmon, Eel, Anchovy, Gilt-Head Bream, Sea Bass and Sardine.

quests.name: Build Chicken Coop / Construir Galinheiro
quests.notes: Ask Buzz to build it. Keep 25 Wooden Planks, 15 Iron Nails, 10 Mortar and 15 Gold in inventory.

quests.name: Buy Chicken / Comprar Galinha
quests.notes: After the Chicken Coop is complete, Holly sells chickens.

quests.name: Chicken Care / Cuidar da Galinha
quests.notes: Place chicken in coop using Decoration Mode. Feed with Seeds Mix and fill trough with Bucket with Water.
